response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics perfectly match the vocal performance of '虎狼来' by Ouro Kronii and Tokino Sora. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were used during the song section, and the dialogue was fully transcribed manually as it was not included in the JSON. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset and offset, with zero output during instrumental pauses.

subtitles.original: 不安などないけれど
subtitles.english: I have no complaints, but

subtitles.original: 描いた夢と違うけれど
subtitles.english: Though it's different from the dream I drew

subtitles.original: なぜか心に穴が空いたようだ
subtitles.english: For some reason, it feels like there's a hole in my heart

subtitles.original: 気づいてしまうから
subtitles.english: Because I'll end up realizing it

subtitles.original: ありきたりな人生に 今ピリオドを打て。
subtitles.english: Put a period to this ordinary life right now

subtitles.original: 爆ぜるようなこの気持ちが 抑えようもない衝動が
subtitles.english: This feeling like it's about to burst, this uncontrollable urge

subtitles.original: 望み通り叶わない
subtitles.english: Won't come true as desired

subtitles.original: 現実になってまだまだ くたばってなんか無いぜ
subtitles.english: Becoming reality, I'm still not dead yet

subtitles.original: 神に誓って泣いた思い出
subtitles.english: Swearing to God, these memories of crying

subtitles.original: 実態ない将来に不安定で痛い
subtitles.english: Painfully unstable in a formless future

subtitles.original: 騒ぐ心の音を聞こう
subtitles.english: Let's listen to the sound of our roaring hearts

subtitles.original: 夢の狭間で廃れぬよう
subtitles.english: So we don't fade away in the chasm of dreams

subtitles.original: 足を止めていられぬよう
subtitles.english: So we cannot stop our feet

subtitles.original: 虎狼来 迷子ステイホーム
subtitles.english: Kororon, lost child, stay home

subtitles.original: 言葉ではなんとでも言える ここが正念場
subtitles.english: You can say anything with words, this is the critical moment

subtitles.original: そういや外野は愛のないディスカッション 派手にやってくれ福利厚生
subtitles.english: By the way, the spectators have a loveless discussion, do it splashily

subtitles.original: その結果が全てなんだ 許しがたいが
subtitles.english: That result is everything, though it's hard to forgive

subtitles.original: チャンスは１回だ まだ生かしてくれよ世界の中
subtitles.english: There's only one chance, let me keep living in this world

subtitles.original: 定かではないが まだ僕の中には
subtitles.english: It's not certain, but inside of me, there are still...

subtitles.original: 数多余すこともない事実が
subtitles.english: countless facts with nothing left over

subtitles.original: 虎狼に飼いならされる
subtitles.english: Tamed by beasts

subtitles.original: この毎日が嫌食べられて終い
subtitles.english: I hate these daily days, I'll end up being eaten

subtitles.original: 実は不安しかないけれど
subtitles.english: Actually, I have nothing but anxiety, but

subtitles.original: 描いた夢もないけれど
subtitles.english: Though I don't even have a dream drawn

subtitles.original: だから心に穴が空いたようだ
subtitles.english: That's why it feels like there's a hole in my heart

subtitles.original: 気づいてしまった
subtitles.english: I've realized it

subtitles.original: ありきたりな人生に 今ピリオドを打て。
subtitles.english: Put a period to this ordinary life right now

subtitles.original: 爆ぜるようなこの気持ちが 抑えようもない衝動が
subtitles.english: This feeling like it's about to burst, this uncontrollable urge

subtitles.english: Won't come true as desired

subtitles.original: 現実になってまだまだ くたばってなんか無いぜ
subtitles.english: Becoming reality, I'm still not dead yet

subtitles.english: Swearing to God, these memories of crying

subtitles.english: Painfully unstable in a formless future

subtitles.original: Woo! Yay!
subtitles.english: Woo! Yay!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for coming everyone, to my 3D Live.
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming everyone, to my 3D Live.

subtitles.original: My name is Ouro Kronii from Hololive English, and we have Sora-senpai!
subtitles.english: My name is Ouro Kronii from Hololive English, and we have Sora-senpai!

subtitles.original: Yay! Hello! ときのそら、こんそめー！
subtitles.english: Yay! Hello! I'm Tokino Sora, Kon-some!

subtitles.original: Kronii, happy birthday!
subtitles.english: Kronii, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you! Very gorgeous, uh, dress.
subtitles.english: Thank you! Very gorgeous, uh, dress.

subtitles.original: Thank you! ありがとうございます！ Yay!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you so much! Yay!

subtitles.original: Oh man, look at this stage here.
subtitles.english: Oh man, look at this stage here.

subtitles.original: So pretty, look at the night sky!
subtitles.english: So pretty, look at the night sky!

subtitles.original: Wow, きれい！
subtitles.english: Wow, so beautiful!

subtitles.original: Oh, Kronii, Kronii, why did you invite me to your birthday live?
subtitles.english: Oh, Kronii, Kronii, why did you invite me to your birthday live?

subtitles.original: Oh, um, well, last year, um, we hung out together a bit,
subtitles.english: Oh, um, well, last year, um, we hung out together a bit,

subtitles.original: and I had a lot of fun...
subtitles.english: and I had a lot of fun...

subtitles.original: So I wanted to, um, invite you,
subtitles.english: So I wanted to, um, invite you,

subtitles.original: and, um, get to sing together...
subtitles.english: and, um, get to sing together...

subtitles.original: And I thought that would have been really great, so thank you for coming!
subtitles.english: And I thought that would have been really great, so thank you for coming!

subtitles.original: Oh, thank you!
subtitles.english: Oh, thank you!

subtitles.original: Yay! Ah, I'm... so, I love you.
subtitles.english: Yay! Ah, I'm... so, I love you.

subtitles.original: Oh my god!
subtitles.english: Oh my god!

subtitles.original: Love is... love is such a strong word. Um, I... I love you too.
subtitles.english: Love is... love is such a strong word. Um, I... I love you too.

subtitles.original: I want to go to, uh, uh, udon eating with...
subtitles.english: I want to go to, uh, uh, udon eating with...

subtitles.original: Oh, udon!
subtitles.english: Oh, udon!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah, let's go eat! Oh my god!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah, let's go eat! Oh my god!

subtitles.original: Well, we'll like... we'll get anything! What kind of udon...
subtitles.english: Well, we'll like... we'll get anything! What kind of udon...

subtitles.original: I like anything!
subtitles.english: I like anything!
